full_text:
Wang Ji (Boxing) 王基 (伯興)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Ji (王基), styledBoxing (伯興). Fought against Wu and Guanqiu Jian, fighting in three duels and advising to win hearts. Wang Ji was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wang Ji lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
